login.title: CareerOS
login.description: CareerOS automatically organizes your job applications from Gmail, tracks your progress, and provides AI-powered insights to help you make better career decisions.

hero.headline: Your Career Operating System
hero.subhead: Connect your Gmail once. CareerOS automatically discovers your job applications, tracks every status change, and gives you the clarity to move forward with confidence.

autoImport.title: Automatic Import
autoImport.description: Connect your Gmail and CareerOS automatically discovers every job application, saving you hours of manual data entry.

aiInsights.title: AI-Powered Insights
aiInsights.description: Understand your interview rate, response patterns, and career trajectory with intelligence that grows with you.

tracking.title: Progress Tracking
tracking.description: See exactly where each application stands — from submission through interview, offer, and beyond.

connect.title: Connect your Gmail
connect.description: One click. Your existing Gmail account. No passwords stored.

sync.title: We analyze your applications
sync.description: CareerOS identifies hiring-related emails and organizes them into applications.

insights.title: Get career intelligence
insights.description: Track progress, understand patterns, and make confident career decisions.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your career?

sync.title: Setting up your workspace
sync.description: CareerOS is connecting to your Gmail and organizing your career information. This takes just a moment.

stages.connectingDesc: Establishing a secure connection to your Gmail account.
stages.discoveringDesc: Scanning your inbox for job applications and hiring-related emails.
stages.organizingDesc: Structuring your applications, companies, and career timeline.
stages.preparingDesc: Setting up your dashboard with AI-powered insights and recommendations.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Let's move your career forward today.

focus.label: AI Focus
focus.headline: Follow up with Amazon today.
focus.summary: Your application is progressing. A gentle follow-up could move things forward.
focus.welcomeSummary: We're organizing your career and preparing personalized insights.

interviews.title: Upcoming Interviews
interviews.emptyDesc: As your applications progress, interviews will appear here.

timeline.title: Activity
timeline.interviewScheduledDesc: {{company}} invited you to a technical interview.
timeline.applicationRejectedDesc: {{company}} has moved forward with other candidates.
timeline.resumeImprovedDesc: Your resume was optimized for better matches.
timeline.emptyDesc: Connect Gmail or add your first application.

aiPanel.todaySummary: Today looks productive. Two applications need attention and one interview is approaching.
aiPanel.emptyDesc: We'll notify you when new opportunities appear.
aiPanel.insightInterviewPrepDesc: Your Amazon interview is in two days. Review system design fundamentals and behavioral examples.

empty.heading: No applications yet
empty.text: Import your job applications from Gmail or add them manually to start tracking your job search with AI-powered insights.
